subtitles.original: ...居場所
subtitles.english: ...a place to call my own.

subtitles.original: うわっはー！
subtitles.english: Wahahaha!

subtitles.original: みんなー！マフィオーサ、ライブ初お披露目、どうだったー？
subtitles.english: Everyone! How did you like the live debut of "Mafiosa"?

subtitles.original: ちょっと、パンツとマフィオーサで2曲続けてだったんですけど
subtitles.english: Actually, I performed "Pants" and "Mafiosa" back-to-back,

subtitles.original: このね、パンツっていう曲めちゃめちゃ好きで
subtitles.english: and I really love this song called "Pants"!

subtitles.original: あの、ずっと暇なとき、めちゃめちゃ聴いてたので、今回歌えて嬉しいのと
subtitles.english: I used to listen to it all the time in my spare time, so I'm so glad I got to sing it,

subtitles.original: ころねすきーにね、ピンクのパンツを履いて踊ってもらえたのが、凄く楽しかったので
subtitles.english: and seeing the Koronesukis wearing pink pants and dancing was so much fun!

subtitles.original: みんな踊ってくれてありがとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you all so much for dancing!

subtitles.original: はい。でね、今回、えーとマフィオーサのライブ初お披露目をしたくて
subtitles.english: Yes. And this time, since I really wanted to showcase "Mafiosa" live,

subtitles.original: 全部ね、ラップ曲でまとめてみたんですけど
subtitles.english: I decided to put together a setlist entirely of rap songs.

subtitles.original: どうだったかな？
subtitles.english: How was it?

subtitles.original: ちょっと初めての試みだったから
subtitles.english: Since it was my first time trying something like this,

subtitles.original: すごいね、あの、準備段階から今日に至るまでめちゃめちゃドキドキで
subtitles.english: I was super nervous from the preparation stage all the way up to today.

subtitles.original: みんな楽しんでくれるかな、とか思ってたんだけど
subtitles.english: I was constantly wondering if everyone would enjoy it.

subtitles.original: だからね、みんなが楽しんで、ノリノリになってくれてたら嬉しいなと思います
subtitles.english: So, I'd be really happy if you all had fun and got into the groove!

subtitles.original: でね、原曲知らないよっていう方がね、えー、結構いると思うんですけど。結構はいないか、いると思うんですけど
subtitles.english: Also, I'm sure there are quite a few people—well, maybe not that many—who don't know the original songs,

subtitles.original: もしね、そういう方はぜひ、めちゃめちゃかっこいいのでね、全部の曲。原曲ぜひ聴いてみてください
subtitles.english: but all of these songs are incredibly cool, so please check out the originals!

subtitles.original: あ、最後に歌ったマフィオーサもですね、めちゃめちゃ原曲かっこいいので、ぜひみんな聴いてね！
subtitles.english: Oh, and "Mafiosa," which I sang at the very end, has an incredibly cool original version, so definitely listen to it!

subtitles.original: はい。ということで、今回もあります！周年グッズです！こちら！
subtitles.english: Alright! And with that, we have them once again! Our anniversary merchandise! Here they are!

subtitles.original: えっ、今回はですね、なんと、うすた京介先生に描き下ろししていただきました！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: This time, incredibly, Usuta Kyosuke-sensei illustrated these drawings for us! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: 1つずつ見ていきますかね
subtitles.english: Shall we take a look at them one by one?

subtitles.original: えー、最初はですね、YB-2、久しぶりに見ました。え、うちのブランドYB-2です
subtitles.english: First up is... YB-2, it's been a while! Yes, our brand YB-2.

subtitles.original: YB-2の、えー、うすた先生バージョンのね、パーカーです
subtitles.english: It's a hoodie featuring Usuta-sensei's version of YB-2.

subtitles.original: え、裏面にイラストがくる感じですね。で、胸元にYB-2って入ってて
subtitles.english: The illustration is on the back. And it has "YB-2" on the chest.

subtitles.original: 腕にね、あの、ころねのモチーフの骨が入っております。これめちゃめちゃかっこいいと思うのでね
subtitles.english: And on the sleeve, there's a bone, which is Korone's motif. I think this looks super cool,

subtitles.original: お楽しみに！
subtitles.english: so look forward to it!

subtitles.original: 続いてこちら
subtitles.english: Next is this one!

subtitles.original: こちらはですね、あの、パーカーと同じイラストのサコッシュです
subtitles.english: This is a sacoche bag featuring the same illustration as the hoodie.

subtitles.original: ま、結構ね、なんかエキスポとかフェスとか、なんかみんなのね、イベントとかに来るときにサコッシュ使ってる人結構いたなと思って
subtitles.english: I've noticed quite a few people using sacoches when they come to events like Expo or festivals,

subtitles.original: ころねもサコッシュ出したい！っていうことで、サコッシュも出しました。皆さんぜひ使ってください
subtitles.english: so I wanted to release one too! That's why we made it. Please use it!

subtitles.original: 続いてこちら
subtitles.english: Next is this!

subtitles.original: こちらはですね、えーと、ごめんなさいね
subtitles.english: This one is... oh, sorry, excuse me...

subtitles.original: え、ラップドッグキャップ！こちらはですね、えー、ひこさん先生のデザインで、あの、出させていただきました。ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: The Rap Dog Cap! This one is designed by Hikosan-sensei. Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: え、ここにね、ころねの骨がクロスしてて
subtitles.english: The bones of Korone's motif are crossed on the front,

subtitles.original: 横にまたこれ、YB-2です。これもYB-2なのでね。サコッシュと、あ、サコッシュ、あ、サコッシュもYB-2か
subtitles.english: and on the side, it says "YB-2". Yes, this one is also YB-2. The sacoche... oh, the sacoche was YB-2 as well!

subtitles.original: パーカーとサコッシュと帽子、え、全部YB-2のブランドでございます。よろしくお願いします
subtitles.english: The hoodie, sacoche, and cap are all under the YB-2 brand. I hope you like them!

subtitles.original: はい次
subtitles.english: Okay, next!

subtitles.original: これはYB-2じゃない、ころねのランダムラバーストラップ！
subtitles.english: This one is NOT YB-2—it's Korone's Random Rubber Straps!

subtitles.original: こちらはフカヒレママに描き下ろしてもらいました。ママありがとう！
subtitles.english: These were illustrated by Fukahire-mama. Thank you, Mama!

subtitles.original: こちらね、4種類ランダムで
subtitles.english: There are 4 different designs available at random.

subtitles.original: で、今回ね、ラップの曲が多かったということで、あの、ラップをしてるね、ころねのイラストもありますので
subtitles.english: And since we had a lot of rap songs this time, there's also an illustration of Korone rapping!

subtitles.original: ぜひ皆さん、全種類目指してよかったら買ってみてください
subtitles.english: So if you'd like, please try to collect all the designs!

subtitles.original: 通常衣装と、え、YB-2のジャンプスーツと、ドッグ、え、グッドドッグ衣装と、ラップ衣装ですね。よかったら、はい、こちらもご検討ください
subtitles.english: We have the default outfit, the YB-2 jumpsuit, the "Good Dog" outfit, and the rap outfit. Please check them out!

subtitles.original: そしてフルセットの購入特典は
subtitles.english: And the bonus for purchasing the full set is...

subtitles.original: え、うすた先生描き下ろしのですね、ポストカード
subtitles.english: a postcard illustrated by Usuta-sensei!

subtitles.original: え、数量限定版もありますけれども、めちゃめちゃ、あの、用意しておりますので、あの、急がないで大丈夫です。あの、マジで結構用意したので、あの、ゆっくりご購入ください
subtitles.english: There is a limited quantity version too, but we've prepared plenty of them, so there's no need to rush. Seriously, we have a lot in stock, so please take your time with your purchase.

subtitles.original: はい、で、通常バージョンはね、箔押しの複製サイン入りとなっております
subtitles.english: And the standard version comes with a foil-stamped replica signature!

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、今回のライブもみんな、たくさん見てくれてありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: Alright, thank you so much to everyone who tuned in to watch today's live stream!

subtitles.original: 以上、レイジードッグナイトでした！みんな本当にいつもありがとうね！
subtitles.english: And that's all for LAZY DOG NIGHT! Thank you so much for always supporting me!

subtitles.original: また会おう！
subtitles.english: Let's meet again!

subtitles.original: またねー！
subtitles.english: See ya!

responses.thoughts:
**My Analysis of Korone's 7th Anniversary Stream**

Okay, here's the breakdown of my thought process: The user needs subtitles for a video of Inugami Korone discussing her 7th-anniversary concert and merchandise. The task is to generate synchronized Japanese transcriptions (`og`) and English translations (`en`) with millisecond-level precision using timestamps `s` and `e`. No CC tags like [applause] are allowed.

First, I need to understand the structure: The video starts with the end of a song (`00:00.000` - `00:01.300`). I'm noting the initial sounds (breathing, walking) and ignoring them, as per the rules. Korone starts speaking at `00:09.500`. Laughs need special attention.

I'm carefully transcribing and translating each phrase, making sure to capture the nuances of her speech. I'll translate her initial greeting and reactions to the live performance, then the details about the songs, merchandise, and full set bonuses. I will also be sure to listen carefully for her "wahahaha" laughs.

Next, I extract the spoken parts and translate them, paying careful attention to accuracy and timing. I also account for her pauses, filler words ("えー", "あの"), and any sound effects ("Gyooon!") that need to be ignored.

I'll then confirm and refine the time codes by cross-referencing to ensure precise synchronization. The output must adhere to the specified JSON format, with proper double quotes and character limits. Then, I'll output the data according to the format I've confirmed.
